desc: Fix em-dash encoding in devset.ps1 (run on Windows)
Fix em-dash encoding in devset.ps1 (run on Windows)
Pipeline — sheet module (right-click tab → View Code)
code:
Private Sub Worksheet_Change(ByVal Target As Range)
    If Target.Column <> 3 Then Exit Sub
    If Target.Row < 2 Then Exit Sub
    If Target.Cells.Count > 1 Then Exit Sub
    
    Dim cellVal As String
    cellVal = Trim(CStr(Target.Value))
    
    If cellVal = "Quoted/Not Taken" Or cellVal = "Bound" Or cellVal = "Closed" Then
        On Error GoTo Cleanup
        Application.EnableEvents = False
        
        Dim wsDst As Worksheet
        Set wsDst = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("Completed New Business")
        
        Dim nextRow As Long
        nextRow = wsDst.Cells(wsDst.Rows.Count, "A").End(xlUp).Row + 1
        If nextRow < 2 Then nextRow = 2
        
        ' Copy row to destination and clear source
        Me.Range("A" & Target.Row & ":L" & Target.Row).Copy wsDst.Range("A" & nextRow)
        Me.Range("A" & Target.Row & ":L" & Target.Row).ClearContents
        
        ' Sort source (Pipeline) after clearing
        With Me.Sort
            .SortFields.Clear
            .SortFields.Add2 Key:=Me.Range("A2:A2500"), Order:=xlAscending
            .SetRange Me.Range("A2:L2500")
            .Header = xlNo
            .Apply
        End With
        
        ' Sort destination (Completed New Business) after pasting
        With wsDst.Sort
            .SortFields.Clear
            .SortFields.Add2 Key:=wsDst.Range("A2:A2500"), Order:=xlAscending
            .SetRange wsDst.Range("A2:L2500")
            .Header = xlNo
            .Apply
        End With
        
        Application.EnableEvents = True
    End If
    
    Exit Sub
Cleanup:
    Application.EnableEvents = True
End Sub

desc: Completed New Business — sheet module (right-click tab → View Code)
code:
Private Sub Worksheet_Change(ByVal Target As Range)
    If Target.Column <> 3 Then Exit Sub
    If Target.Row < 2 Then Exit Sub
    If Target.Cells.Count > 1 Then Exit Sub
    
    Dim cellVal As String
    cellVal = Trim(CStr(Target.Value))
    
    If cellVal <> "Quoted/Not Taken" And cellVal <> "Bound" And cellVal <> "Closed" And cellVal <> "" Then
        On Error GoTo Cleanup
        Application.EnableEvents = False
        
        Dim wsSrc As Worksheet
        Set wsSrc = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("Pipeline")
        
        Dim nextRow As Long
        nextRow = wsSrc.Cells(wsSrc.Rows.Count, "A").End(xlUp).Row + 1
        If nextRow < 2 Then nextRow = 2
        
        ' Copy row back to source and clear destination
        Me.Range("A" & Target.Row & ":L" & Target.Row).Copy wsSrc.Range("A" & nextRow)
        Me.Range("A" & Target.Row & ":L" & Target.Row).ClearContents
        
        ' Sort origin (Completed New Business) after clearing
        With Me.Sort
            .SortFields.Clear
            .SortFields.Add2 Key:=Me.Range("A2:A2500"), Order:=xlAscending
            .SetRange Me.Range("A2:L2500")
            .Header = xlNo
            .Apply
        End With
        
        ' Sort destination (Pipeline) after pasting
        With wsSrc.Sort
            .SortFields.Clear
            .SortFields.Add2 Key:=wsSrc.Range("A2:A2500"), Order:=xlAscending
            .SetRange wsSrc.Range("A2:L2500")
            .Header = xlNo
            .Apply
        End With
        
        Application.EnableEvents = True
    End If
    
    Exit Sub
Cleanup:
    Application.EnableEvents = True
End Sub
